title: T4-B heavy tank

The '''T4-B heavy tank''' was an all-purpose battle tank used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Description==
The T4-B was armed with two fire linked [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], with three [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] tubes placed between them, the firepower of which was devastating against infantry units.<ref name="DB" /> Typically, missiles were used at long range, against any target, then the tanks would close in and engage the enemy with their powerful anti-armor laser cannons.<ref name="EaW">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref>

[[File:T4b-recg.jpg|left|thumb|A T4-B guarding a Rebel outpost.]]
The T4-B provided the Rebels enough of a punch in ground conflicts to withstand significant [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ground forces. They were capable of defeating most Imperial ground vehicles of the time, including [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]], [[2-M Saber-class repulsor tank/Legends|2-M repulsor tanks]], and [[TIE ap-1|TIE Maulers]], as well as being capable of battling [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] more effectively than lighter vehicles.<ref name="EaW" />

Although powerful, the unit did have significant drawbacks. Its tracked design limited its mobility (though its mass and power more than offset this flaw) and was expensive to produce, leading the Alliance to limit its use.<ref name="EAWGG" />

==History==
The vehicle, along with the [[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|T2-B repulsor tank]], was one of many new designs acquired by the Alliance during a raid on an [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]] manufacturing plant, and was among the heaviest armored units used by the Rebels during the course of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="DB" />

[[File:BattleOfBozPity-GalacticCivilWar.jpg|thumb|A vacant T4-B sits within the [[Battle of Boz Pity (Galactic Civil War)/Legends|Battle of Boz Pity]].]]
A T4-B was present inside the Rebel's [[Great Temple/Legends|Main Base]] during the [[Evacuation of Yavin]]. It was used by the operative [[X2]].<ref name="BF:ES PSP">''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'', [[Wikipedia:PlayStation Portable|PlayStation Portable]] version</ref> Soon after, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]] used one during a [[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (0.5 ABY)|skirmish]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. The Squadron also used one to [[Battle of Boz Pity (Galactic Civil War)/Legends|defend]] a base on [[Boz Pity/Legends|Boz Pity]].<ref name="BF:RS">''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]''</ref>

A large number of T4-B tanks were destroyed by the Empire during the [[Battle of Mygeeto (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Mygeeto]].<ref name="Ace">''[[Star Wars: Imperial Ace]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'', the T4-B's missiles are fired from above the laser cannons and on top of the tank there is a mortar launcher.<ref name="BF:RS" /> In ''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Elite Squadron]]'', the T4-Bs are armed with two smaller anti-personnel/anti-armor blaster cannons above its tracks.<ref name="BF:ES PSP" />
